meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Beat Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell with our expert Claude Code setup guide. Optimize your MVP speed-to-market using Antigravity and professional AI workflows.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start shipping. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transition from passive learner to active builder. This setup automates your boilerplate, enforces production-grade architectural patterns, and forces your AI agent to debug against real-world constraints rather than theoretical code-along examples.
content.intro:
The screen glows with another 'Build a To-Do List' tutorial, but your real-world SaaS idea remains stagnant in a folder of half-finished boilerplate. You are stuck in the infinite loop of tutorial hell, consuming content that feels like progress but delivers zero revenue. It is time to stop being a spectator and start being an architect.

True velocity comes from leveraging AI as a senior engineering partner, not a search engine. By configuring Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-leverage development environment that handles the heavy lifting of scaffolding, allowing you to focus purely on product-market fit and business logic.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean, isolated workspace that prevents dependency conflicts and ensures your AI agent has full context of your project structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the directory structure and generate a professional README.md and .gitignore tailored for a production-ready SaaS MVP in Next.js and TypeScript.

steps.title: Domain Modeling
steps.description: Define your data schema before writing logic. This forces the AI to understand your business constraints early, preventing architectural debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Drizzle ORM schema for a multi-tenant subscription model including users, organizations, and subscription status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate schema for subscription model'

steps.title: API Layer Scaffolding
steps.description: Automate the creation of secure, type-safe endpoints. This ensures your backend is ready for real traffic, not just local testing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a secure API route handler for payment processing using Stripe webhooks with proper error handling and logging.

steps.title: Contextual Debugging
steps.description: Instead of asking 'why is this broken', provide the AI with your logs to perform root-cause analysis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these build logs and identify the dependency conflict causing the runtime error in the authentication middleware.

steps.title: Production Hardening
steps.description: Optimize your code for security and performance. This step moves your MVP from 'it works' to 'it scales'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks, specifically looking at database query efficiency.

pro_tips: Always provide your 'tech stack philosophy' in your system prompt so Claude doesn't default to outdated libraries.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests *before* the implementation code to ensure your business logic remains uncompromised.
Treat your Antigravity prompt library as a proprietary asset; version control your prompts just like your application code.
If Claude gets stuck in a loop, force a context reset by summarizing the current state and explicitly stating the next objective.
Leverage Claude's ability to read your entire codebase by using targeted file referencing to prevent hallucinations about your project structure.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment, run a load test, and begin your first round of user interviews to validate your core features.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to build faster than 99% of your competitors. Stop iterating on tutorials and start iterating on your product. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
